match.userMessage:
Slow dolly forward begins from a close-up of Scarlett's sun-kissed hands holding the gold lipstick tube above the pale marble vanity. Her fingers grip the base and twist it once in a deliberate motion, extending the vivid coral bullet upward where direct window sunlight catches its surface. The camera maintains tight focus on the product and hands throughout. Sunlight reflections shift subtly across the marble as the bullet rises.

gentle ocean waves and soft breeze through open window. lipstick tube twisting mechanism.

Single continuous shot, no cuts. Avoid jitter and bent limbs.
